name: Fluxo 1 - Upload e Processamento do Currículo

nodes.name: Webhook POST /upload-resume
nodes.notes: Recebe multipart/form-data com: campo 'file' (PDF binário) e campo 'id' (UUID gerado no front-end)

nodes.name: Extract from File (PDF to Text)
nodes.notes: Converte PDF binário em texto puro. Resultado disponível em $json.text — sem custo de API externa.

values.content: You are an elite tech recruiter. You are brutally honest, sarcastic, and have zero patience for corporate buzzwords. Read this resume: {{ $json.text }}. Return ONLY a strict JSON with two main keys: 1) 'teaser_gratis' containing 'employability_score' (X/100), 'ats_rejection_chance' (X%), and 'hook_message' (one vague, panic-inducing sentence about a catastrophic error found). 2) 'resultado_completo' containing 'brutal_roast' (a cruel but funny paragraph judging the resume), 'red_flags' (array of 3 terrible cliches found), and 'rewritten_summary' (a perfectly optimized, ATS-friendly professional summary to fix their mess).

nodes.name: OpenAI - Analisar Currículo
nodes.notes: Model: gpt-4o-mini. Response Format: json_object. Configure sua credential OpenAI nas Settings do n8n.

nodes.name: Postgres - Insert resume_roasts
nodes.notes: Insere o registro com status_pagamento=false. O resultado_completo fica bloqueado até o pagamento.

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook - Retorna Teaser
nodes.notes: Retorna ao front-end SOMENTE o teaser_gratis. O brutal_roast fica trancado no banco.
